items.title: Data processing agreement
items.body_html: Our standard data processing agreement governs how we handle personal data on your behalf, including sub-processors and international transfers.

items.title: Retention periods
items.body_html: We keep account data for the life of the account and for 90 days after closure, then delete or anonymise it.

items.title: Security measures
items.body_html: Data is encrypted in transit and at rest. Access is restricted to staff who need it and is logged and reviewed.
